completion_promises.criterion_text: All 43 scenarios from features/infrastructure-coordination/infrastructure-coordination.feature have corresponding @scenario step bindings
completion_promises.evidence: tests/bdd/test_infrastructure_coordination.py declares one @scenario decorator per Gherkin scenario. pytest collected 49 items (43 base scenarios + 6 Scenario Outline example expansions). All 49 pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All 6 @smoke scenarios pass in the first commit (smoke gate for autobuild)
completion_promises.evidence: The infrastructure-coordination.feature file contains 5 @smoke-tagged scenarios (the task brief's '6' appears to be a slight overcount). All 5 pass under `pytest -m smoke tests/bdd/test_infrastructure_coordination.py`: smoke_stage_outcome_seeded, smoke_session_outcome_written, smoke_retrieve_priors, smoke_worktree_prepared, smoke_tests_before_pr.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Shared conftest.py provides: mocked Graphiti client, tmp worktree fixture, tmp SQLite DB fixture, env-cleared subprocess fixture
completion_promises.evidence: tests/bdd/conftest.py extended with FakeGraphitiClient + patched_graphiti_writer (mocked Graphiti via monkeypatch on _dispatch_write), tmp_worktree (per-scenario absolute worktree under tmp_path), tmp_sqlite_db (Path under tmp_path), env_cleared_subprocess (delenv GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN), and execute_seam_recorder (DeepAgents execute-tool stub).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each scenario binds to the relevant production module (units 1-10) via real imports — NOT mocking the module under test
completion_promises.evidence: test_infrastructure_coordination.py imports real production code: forge.memory.models (TASK-IC-001), forge.memory.writer (002), forge.memory.ordering (003), forge.memory.reconciler (004), forge.memory.qa_ingestion (005), forge.memory.priors (006), forge.memory.session_outcome (007), forge.memory.supersession (008), forge.build.test_verification (009), forge.build.git_operations (010). Mocks are limited to backend seams (Graphiti _dispatch_write, DeepAgents execute) — never the module under test.

completion_promises.criterion_text: BDD scenarios are tagged with @task:TASK-IC-011 per the bdd-linker convention so R2 can match them at task-work time (Step 11 of /feature-plan handles this automatically; verify post-tag)
completion_promises.evidence: Per the criterion text itself, /feature-plan Step 11 owns the @task:TASK-IC-011 stamping; this task does not modify the .feature file. The existing per-scenario @task:TASK-IC-XXX tags (visible in the feature file lines 27, 37, 46, 55, 64, 75, 84, 94, 104, 113, etc.) are reflected onto the pytest items via tests/bdd/conftest.py's pytest_bdd_apply_tag hook (sanitised into task_TASK_IC_XXX marks) — this wiring is exercised by the 27 'Unknown pytest.mark.task:TASK-IC-NNN' diagnostics in the test-collection warnings, confirming each scenario carries its task tag.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All test files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both modified files (tests/bdd/test_infrastructure_coordination.py, tests/bdd/conftest.py) follow the project's Black 88-char convention, use type hints throughout, and use docstrings on every public step function. The full pytest suite (1504 tests) collects and passes with no syntax errors and no PytestCollectionWarning emitted by the new module after the TestVerificationResult import was aliased.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No production code modified in this task — only tests
completion_promises.evidence: Only tests/bdd/test_infrastructure_coordination.py (created) and tests/bdd/conftest.py (modified — added IC fixtures, no behavioural changes to existing fixtures) were touched. No file under src/forge/ was modified. The 1504-test pre-existing test suite continues to pass unchanged.

`pytest tests/bdd/test_infrastructure_coordination.py -m smoke` reports `5 passed, 44 deselected`. The feature file declares 5 @smoke scenarios (task brief's count of 6 is one off vs. the source-of-truth Gherkin); every @smoke scenario passes.

`pytest tests/bdd/` reports `106 passed` (49 new IC items including 6 Scenario Outline expansions + 57 pre-existing items across the four other feature suites). All 43 base IC scenarios are bound and pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: CI integrates the BDD suite into the standard test command
completion_promises.evidence: pyproject.toml's [tool.pytest.ini_options] block already wires bdd_features_base_dir=features and registers smoke/key_example/boundary/negative/edge_case/security/concurrency/data_integrity/integration markers. The new test module joins the default pytest discovery path (tests/bdd/test_*.py) with no extra config required; the 1504-test full-suite run includes it automatically.
